---
title: "Clustering Comparison: New vs IDEAL paper clustering"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_width: 14
    fig_height: 10
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(knitr)
library(cluster)

# Set working directory to project root
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '../../')

# Custom color palette
custom_colors <- c("#c45335", "#008585",  "#cc7a3d", "#74a892", "#675a42", "#25231d")
```

## Data Loading

```{r load_data, echo=FALSE}
# Load clustering data from both approaches
clustering_all <- list(
  groups = read.csv('data/results/clustering/groups.csv'),
  chars = read.csv('data/results/clustering/characteristics.csv'),
  centroids = read.csv('data/results/clustering/centroids.csv'),
  kcca_info = read.csv('data/results/clustering/kcca_info.csv')
)

# Load clustering data from IDEAL paper
clustering_ideal <- list(
  groups = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/groups.csv'),
  chars = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/characteristics.csv'),
  centroids = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/centroids.csv'),
  kcca_info = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/kcca_info.csv')
)

# Find datasets in both clusterings (for fair comparison)
all_datasets <- clustering_all$groups$dataset_name
ideal_datasets <- clustering_ideal$groups$dataset_name
common_datasets <- intersect(all_datasets, ideal_datasets)
only_standard <- setdiff(all_datasets, ideal_datasets)
only_ideal <- setdiff(ideal_datasets, all_datasets)

# Display basic info
cat("=== DATASET COUNTS ===\n\n")
cat("Clustering with full datasets:\n")
cat("  - Total analyzed:", nrow(clustering_all$chars), "\n")
cat("  - Successfully clustered:", nrow(clustering_all$groups), "\n")

cat("\n=== IDEAL Clustering ===\n")
cat("  - Total analyzed:", nrow(clustering_ideal$chars), "\n")
cat("  - Successfully clustered:", nrow(clustering_ideal$groups), "\n")

cat("\n=== DATASET OVERLAP COMPARISON ===\n\n")
cat("Datasets in BOTH clusterings (for comparison):", length(common_datasets), "\n")
```

## Clustering Overview

### Clustering with all datasets

```{r standard_summary, echo=FALSE, fig.height=16, fig.width=14}
# Summary statistics for standard clustering
cat("K-value:", clustering_all$kcca_info$K[1], "\n")
#cat("Total within-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_all$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1], 4), "\n")
#cat("Between-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_all$kcca_info$betweenss[1], 4), "\n")

std_groups <- clustering_all$groups

# Function to create cluster plot with convex hull
create_cluster_plot <- function(data, cluster_col, title) {
  data$cluster <- factor(data[[cluster_col]])
  
  hulls <- do.call(rbind, lapply(levels(data$cluster), function(cluster) {
    cluster_data <- data[data$cluster == cluster, ]
    if(nrow(cluster_data) > 2) {
      hull_indices <- chull(cluster_data$coordinate_1, cluster_data$coordinate_2)
      hull_data <- cluster_data[c(hull_indices, hull_indices[1]), ]
      hull_data$cluster <- cluster
      return(hull_data)
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  }))
  
  ggplot(data, aes(x = coordinate_1, y = coordinate_2, color = cluster, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_polygon(data = hulls, alpha = 0.15, linetype = "dashed", color = NA) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = dataset_name), vjust = -0.5, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title,
         x = "Coordinate 1",
         y = "Coordinate 2",
         color = "Cluster",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

# Function to create silhouette plots
create_silhouette_plot <- function(data, cluster_col, title) {
  # Calculate distance matrix from coordinates
  dist_matrix <- dist(data[, c("coordinate_1", "coordinate_2")])
  clusters <- as.numeric(factor(data[[cluster_col]]))
  
  # Calculate silhouette scores
  sil <- silhouette(clusters, dist_matrix)
  
  # Create ggplot version of silhouette
  sil_df <- as.data.frame(sil)
  sil_df$cluster <- rep(unique(clusters), table(clusters))
  sil_df$sample <- seq_len(nrow(sil_df))
  sil_df <- sil_df %>% arrange(cluster, sil_width)
  sil_df$x <- seq_len(nrow(sil_df))
  
  ggplot(sil_df, aes(x = x, y = sil_width, fill = factor(cluster))) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title,
         x = "Sample Index",
         y = "Silhouette Width",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_blank())
}

# HClust K=4 with silhouette
p_hclust_4 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "hclust_4", "Standard: HClust K=4")
s_hclust_4 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "hclust_4", "Silhouette: HClust K=4")
grid.arrange(p_hclust_4, s_hclust_4, ncol = 2)

# HClust K=5 with silhouette
p_hclust_5 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "hclust_5", "Standard: HClust K=5")
s_hclust_5 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "hclust_5", "Silhouette: HClust K=5")
grid.arrange(p_hclust_5, s_hclust_5, ncol = 2)

# HClust K=6 with silhouette
p_hclust_6 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "hclust_6", "Standard: HClust K=6")
s_hclust_6 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "hclust_6", "Silhouette: HClust K=6")
grid.arrange(p_hclust_6, s_hclust_6, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=4 with silhouette
p_kmeans_4 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_4", "Standard: KMeans K=4")
s_kmeans_4 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_4", "Silhouette: KMeans K=4")
grid.arrange(p_kmeans_4, s_kmeans_4, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=5 with silhouette
p_kmeans_5 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_5", "Standard: KMeans K=5")
s_kmeans_5 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_5", "Silhouette: KMeans K=5")
grid.arrange(p_kmeans_5, s_kmeans_5, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=6 with silhouette
p_kmeans_6 <- create_cluster_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_6", "Standard: KMeans K=6")
s_kmeans_6 <- create_silhouette_plot(std_groups, "kmeans_6", "Silhouette: KMeans K=6")
grid.arrange(p_kmeans_6, s_kmeans_6, ncol = 2)
```

### IDEAL Clustering

```{r ideal_summary, echo=FALSE, fig.height=16, fig.width=14}
# Summary statistics for ideal clustering
cat("K-value:", clustering_ideal$kcca_info$K[1], "\n")
#cat("Total within-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_ideal$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1], 4), "\n")
#cat("Between-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_ideal$kcca_info$betweenss[1], 4), "\n")

ideal_groups <- clustering_ideal$groups

# HClust K=4 with silhouette
p_ideal_hclust_4 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_4", "IDEAL: HClust K=4")
s_ideal_hclust_4 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_4", "Silhouette: HClust K=4")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_hclust_4, s_ideal_hclust_4, ncol = 2)

# HClust K=5 with silhouette
p_ideal_hclust_5 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_5", "IDEAL: HClust K=5")
s_ideal_hclust_5 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_5", "Silhouette: HClust K=5")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_hclust_5, s_ideal_hclust_5, ncol = 2)

# HClust K=6 with silhouette
p_ideal_hclust_6 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_6", "IDEAL: HClust K=6")
s_ideal_hclust_6 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "hclust_6", "Silhouette: HClust K=6")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_hclust_6, s_ideal_hclust_6, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=4 with silhouette
p_ideal_kmeans_4 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_4", "IDEAL: KMeans K=4")
s_ideal_kmeans_4 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_4", "Silhouette: KMeans K=4")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_kmeans_4, s_ideal_kmeans_4, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=5 with silhouette
p_ideal_kmeans_5 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_5", "IDEAL: KMeans K=5")
s_ideal_kmeans_5 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_5", "Silhouette: KMeans K=5")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_kmeans_5, s_ideal_kmeans_5, ncol = 2)

# KMeans K=6 with silhouette
p_ideal_kmeans_6 <- create_cluster_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_6", "IDEAL: KMeans K=6")
s_ideal_kmeans_6 <- create_silhouette_plot(ideal_groups, "kmeans_6", "Silhouette: KMeans K=6")
grid.arrange(p_ideal_kmeans_6, s_ideal_kmeans_6, ncol = 2)
```

## Changes in Cluster

```{r group_comparison, echo=FALSE}
# Filter to only common datasets
standard_common <- clustering_all$groups %>%
  filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
  as.data.frame()

ideal_common <- clustering_ideal$groups %>%
  filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
  arrange(dataset_name) %>%
  as.data.frame()

standard_common <- standard_common %>% arrange(dataset_name)

# Create comparison dataframe
comparison_df <- data.frame(
  dataset_name = standard_common$dataset_name,
  standard_hclust_4 = standard_common$hclust_4,
  ideal_hclust_4 = ideal_common$hclust_4,
  standard_hclust_5 = standard_common$hclust_5,
  ideal_hclust_5 = ideal_common$hclust_5,
  standard_hclust_6 = standard_common$hclust_6,
  ideal_hclust_6 = ideal_common$hclust_6,
  standard_kmeans_4 = standard_common$kmeans_4,
  ideal_kmeans_4 = ideal_common$kmeans_4,
  standard_kmeans_5 = standard_common$kmeans_5,
  ideal_kmeans_5 = ideal_common$kmeans_5,
  standard_kmeans_6 = standard_common$kmeans_6,
  ideal_kmeans_6 = ideal_common$kmeans_6
)

# Calculate changes
comparison_df$hclust_4_changed <- comparison_df$standard_hclust_4 != comparison_df$ideal_hclust_4
comparison_df$hclust_5_changed <- comparison_df$standard_hclust_5 != comparison_df$ideal_hclust_5
comparison_df$hclust_6_changed <- comparison_df$standard_hclust_6 != comparison_df$ideal_hclust_6
comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed <- comparison_df$standard_kmeans_4 != comparison_df$ideal_kmeans_4
comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed <- comparison_df$standard_kmeans_5 != comparison_df$ideal_kmeans_5
comparison_df$kmeans_6_changed <- comparison_df$standard_kmeans_6 != comparison_df$ideal_kmeans_6

# Summary of changes
summary_changes <- data.frame(
  Algorithm = c("HClust K=4", "HClust K=5", "HClust K=6", "KMeans K=4", "KMeans K=5", "KMeans K=6"),
  Datasets_Changed = c(
    sum(comparison_df$hclust_4_changed),
    sum(comparison_df$hclust_5_changed),
    sum(comparison_df$hclust_6_changed),
    sum(comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed),
    sum(comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed),
    sum(comparison_df$kmeans_6_changed)
  ),
  Total_Datasets = nrow(comparison_df),
  Percent_Changed = c(
    round(sum(comparison_df$hclust_4_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
    round(sum(comparison_df$hclust_5_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
    round(sum(comparison_df$hclust_6_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
    round(sum(comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
    round(sum(comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
    round(sum(comparison_df$kmeans_6_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2)
  )
)

kable(summary_changes)
```

## Visualization: Cluster Comparison

```{r cluster_space_viz, echo=FALSE, fig.height=12, fig.width=14}
# Function to create comparison plots for HClust K values with convex hulls
create_hclust_comparison <- function(std_data, ideal_data, k_value) {
  col_name <- paste0("hclust_", k_value)
  
  # Filter to common datasets
  standard_common <- std_data %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    arrange(dataset_name)
  
  ideal_common <- ideal_data %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    arrange(dataset_name)
  
  # Add cluster column
  standard_common$cluster <- factor(standard_common[[col_name]])
  ideal_common$cluster <- factor(ideal_common[[col_name]])
  
  # Calculate convex hulls for standard clustering
  std_hulls <- do.call(rbind, lapply(levels(standard_common$cluster), function(cluster) {
    cluster_data <- standard_common[standard_common$cluster == cluster, ]
    if(nrow(cluster_data) > 2) {
      hull_indices <- chull(cluster_data$coordinate_1, cluster_data$coordinate_2)
      hull_data <- cluster_data[c(hull_indices, hull_indices[1]), ]
      hull_data$cluster <- cluster
      return(hull_data)
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  }))
  
  # Calculate convex hulls for ideal clustering
  ideal_hulls <- do.call(rbind, lapply(levels(ideal_common$cluster), function(cluster) {
    cluster_data <- ideal_common[ideal_common$cluster == cluster, ]
    if(nrow(cluster_data) > 2) {
      hull_indices <- chull(cluster_data$coordinate_1, cluster_data$coordinate_2)
      hull_data <- cluster_data[c(hull_indices, hull_indices[1]), ]
      hull_data$cluster <- cluster
      return(hull_data)
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  }))
  
  # Create visualizations with convex hulls
  p_standard <- ggplot(standard_common, aes(x = coordinate_1, y = coordinate_2, color = cluster, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_polygon(data = std_hulls, alpha = 0.15, linetype = "dashed", color = NA) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = dataset_name), vjust = -0.5, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("Standard Clustering (HClust K=", k_value, ")", sep = ""),
         x = "Coordinate 1",
         y = "Coordinate 2",
         color = "Cluster",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p_ideal <- ggplot(ideal_common, aes(x = coordinate_1, y = coordinate_2, color = cluster, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_polygon(data = ideal_hulls, alpha = 0.15, linetype = "dashed", color = NA) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = dataset_name), vjust = -0.5, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("IDEAL Clustering (HClust K=", k_value, ")", sep = ""),
         x = "Coordinate 1",
         y = "Coordinate 2",
         color = "Cluster",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  grid.arrange(p_standard, p_ideal, ncol = 2)
}

# Create comparison plots for K=4, K=5, K=6
create_hclust_comparison(clustering_all$groups, clustering_ideal$groups, 4)
create_hclust_comparison(clustering_all$groups, clustering_ideal$groups, 5)
create_hclust_comparison(clustering_all$groups, clustering_ideal$groups, 6)
```

## Dataset Characteristics Analysis

```{r characteristics_analysis, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0) {
  # Filter characteristics to common datasets
  chars_common <- clustering_all$chars %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets)
  
  # Merge characteristics with clustering assignments from both approaches
  chars_analysis <- chars_common %>%
    left_join(
      clustering_all$groups[, c("dataset_name", "hclust_4", "hclust_5", "kmeans_4", "kmeans_5")],
      by = "dataset_name"
    ) %>%
    rename(standard_hclust_4 = hclust_4,
           standard_hclust_5 = hclust_5,
           standard_kmeans_4 = kmeans_4,
           standard_kmeans_5 = kmeans_5)
  
  # Get IDEAL cluster assignments
  ideal_groups <- clustering_ideal$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    select(dataset_name, hclust_4, hclust_5, kmeans_4, kmeans_5) %>%
    rename(ideal_hclust_4 = hclust_4,
           ideal_hclust_5 = hclust_5,
           ideal_kmeans_4 = kmeans_4,
           ideal_kmeans_5 = kmeans_5)
  
  chars_analysis <- chars_analysis %>%
    left_join(ideal_groups, by = "dataset_name")
  
  # ===== STANDARD CLUSTERING ANALYSIS =====
  cat("\n### Standard Clustering Analysis\n\n")
  
  # HClust K=4
  cat("#### HClust K=4 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_std_hc4 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(standard_hclust_4) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_std_hc4, caption = "Standard Clustering: HClust K=4 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  # HClust K=5
  cat("\n#### HClust K=5 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_std_hc5 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(standard_hclust_5) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_std_hc5, caption = "Standard Clustering: HClust K=5 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  cat("\n")
  
  # ===== IDEAL CLUSTERING ANALYSIS =====
  cat("\n### IDEAL Clustering Analysis\n\n")
  
  # HClust K=4
  cat("#### HClust K=4 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc4 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(ideal_hclust_4) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc4, caption = "IDEAL Clustering: HClust K=4 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  # HClust K=5
  cat("\n#### HClust K=5 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc5 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(ideal_hclust_5) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc5, caption = "IDEAL Clustering: HClust K=5 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform characteristics analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```
